---
title: "Data Science Document"
author: "Bryan Sandor"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Answers to questions

- I think being a data scientist marries disciplines (and whichever subdiscipline(s) to which it applies) and statistics in order to make predictions about the population.

- I think a statistician must be versatile enough to work across a variety of fields to consider themself a data scientist.

- As someone with a background in mathematics, statistics, and computer science, I feel this area is very relevant to my studies.

# Code Sample

First we run the instructed code:

```{r}
y <- density(iris$Petal.Width)
```

Then we run code to examine the format of `y`

```{r}
class(y)
typeof(y)
structure(y)
```

Finally, we plot the graph of `y`

```{r}
#| echo: false
plot(y)
```
